job.title: IT Recruitment Specialist
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Join our HR team in Montpellier. As an IT Recruitment Specialist, you source and select the best technical profiles to support Move2Cloud's growth.
mission.2: Sourcer activement les candidats sur LinkedIn et les jobboards
mission.5: Manage candidate tracking in the ATS
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in HR or from a business school
profile.2: 1 to 4 years of experience in recrutement IT
profile.4: Knowledge of IT profiles (developers, infrastructure, DevOps)
profile.5: Enthusiasm, rigour, and strong interpersonal skills
